_conversation_log.text: Hi, thanks for taking a few minutes to chat with us. We're conducting a quick survey on AI adoption in public transportation agencies. This will only take about two minutes.

That's all the questions we have — thank you so much for your time. If you'd like to be entered into our raffle for a chance to win the big prize, just give us your name and phone number and we'll get you entered.
